programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: The game show returns in a midweek slot, with a host of fresh games designed to test contestants' skill, nerve and determination. First up is Derry-Londonderry radiographer Lindsey, who believes that working in the trauma department of Southampton Hospital will help her stay calm under pressure. She is followed by retired Yorkshireman Keith, who at 70 is the oldest person to have appeared on the show. Will his extra years give him an advantage in defeating the Cube? Phillip Schofield hosts(n)

programme.title: Take Your Pick
programme.desc: Des O'Connor hosts the popular game show, inviting competitors to play the Yes-No game and then make that all-important final choice - whether to take the money or open the box(n)

programme.title: Take Your Pick
programme.desc: Des O'Connor hosts the popular game show, inviting competitors to play the Yes-No game and then make that all-important final choice - whether to take the money or open the box(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap show(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Veteran newsreader Alastair Stewart, Atomic Kitten's Natasha Hamilton, TV cleaner Kim Woodburn and presenter Keith Chegwin compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by pitting their general knowledge against one of the show's resident trivia experts. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Presented by Bradley Walsh(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Former Blur bassist Alex James, ex-MP Ann Widdecombe, Radio 1 DJ Sara Cox and This Morning's Eamonn Holmes pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a large cash prize for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught. Bradley Walsh presents(n)

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Guests taking their place in the hotseat are Greg Rusedski and his wife Lucy playing for the Catholic Children's Society, Alastair Campbell and his partner Fiona Millar playing for the Leukaemia Research Fund and Joan Collins and husband Percy Gibson playing for the Shooting Star Children's Hospice. Chris Tarrant presents(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.desc: Former Dancing on Ice judge Karen Barber and comedian Paddy McGuinness are joined by their families as they compete to win up to £30,000 for their chosen charities, Cancer Research and the British Heart Foundation. Hosted by Vernon Kay(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The team is called in when the father of a man on trial for murdering a policeman threatens the judge(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A girl injured in a road accident dies mysteriously in hospital, and Quincy's investigation leads him to some disquieting numbers about emergency room care(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part two of two. Theo tries to prove that an imprisoned woman is innocent, but is framed for intimidating an informant to stop him getting to the truth. Geraldine Page guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The daughter of a prominent professor is terrified by a mysterious prowler who haunts the grounds of her home by night and seems able to scale sheer walls with ease. Guest starring Charles Kay, Sarah Woodward, Adrian Lukis and Alice Morphy(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry agrees to protect an ex-convict who is being targeted by former partners wanting a share of money stolen during a bank heist. Meanwhile, Arthur resorts to devious tactics to obtain the location of the stashed loot first. Dennis Waterman and George Cole star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 enters a deadly race with the KGB to free a suspected double agent while he is in transit from prison to court, in the hope the action will flush out a mole operating inside the unit. Action adventure, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A sergeant is injured in a shooting incident and names his informant as the person responsible. However, the suspected man's girlfriend insists that the officer is corrupt and steals away to be with her lover, who has gone into hiding. Lynda La Plante guest stars(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The future of a riding school for handicapped children is threatened by the murder of its owner. Meanwhile, Dr Astin's son struggles to adjust to life to his new life(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo helps a Yugoslavian princess who has come to New York disguised as a nun to recover her stolen family jewels - now in the hands of a mobster. Maria Schell guest stars(n)

programme.title: The Memoirs of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An elderly widow enlists Holmes' help to ascertain why a mystery purchaser should want to buy not just her house, but also all its contents. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett, Edward Hardwicke and Peter Wyngarde(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: The prospect of a police reward persuades Arthur to go on the trail of a petty criminal who has stolen a suitcase crammed with money. However, it transpires a gang of international counterfeiters is also after the cash. George Cole stars(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle teams up with a Hong Kong cop, who is in London trailing a Triad gang supplying drugs to US army personnel in Germany while operating an international protection racket. Meanwhile, Bodie goes undercover as a down-and-out in a squat where two young drug addicts have died. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A security guard is murdered during a payroll snatch, and Regan and Carter are called in to support local investigating officers. However, bad blood between the maverick detective inspector and the force's chief superintendent going back several years manifests itself in an old allegation of corruption being rekindled. Richard Griffiths features alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman in the final episode of the crime drama(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as DJ Scott Mills, actress Sunetra Sarker, boxer Anthony Ogogo and TV presenter Johnny Ball pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: The Border Force pulls over a Ghanaian businessman declaring £114,000 in cash, there is love in the air at the unlikely location of T5 arrivals when a blind date takes place and it is the end of an era on the airfield for chief trainer Simon(n)

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Terminal 5 receives a very special visitor, leaving buggy driver Carlo star-struck. British Airways have a new robot on the airfield and Border Force release the hounds in search of dirty money(n)

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside town's tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chief's efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielberg's thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw(n)

programme.title: Collateral Damage (2002)
programme.desc: A heroic firefighter is plunged into the world of international terrorism when his wife and child are killed in a horrific attack. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Francesca Neri, Elias Koteas and Cliff Curtis(n)

The people he meets make him question his own preconceptions as a biologist and naturalist(n)

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates a consortium building a lethal fighter plane in eastern Europe, that appears willing to kill to supress publication of the aircraft's appalling safetly record. Lynda Bellingham guest stars, with Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.desc: Regan and Carter stake out a dodgy garage, believed to be the base of a criminal gang. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star in the first episode of the crime-busting drama, with Ian Hendry, Brian Blessed and June Brown(n)

Paul Verhoeven's sci-fi thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Rachel Ticotin and Michael Ironside(n)
